title: pterostylis serotina
intro: Pterostylis serotina, also known as the autumn greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It is a terrestrial orchid with a unique, greenish-brown flower that grows in the wild. The autumn greenhood has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing.
